programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Donatello tells the other three Turtles that, based on his calculations, the Earth has changed its orbit and is heading for the Sun.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The connection between Earth and Vestroia is becoming weaker and weaker. When Dan and Athena learn of this, they take the initiative. A journey to Auropolis is their last hope for a possible rescue and reversal of the situation.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Athena discover that the Swarm have been absorbing vast amounts of Earth's energy, and it turns out that Magnus has been leading the Awesome Brawlers to help defend the planet.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers have an uphill battle ahead of them. They battle against an ultra-powerful Bakugan villain, Hanoj, whose only objective is to devour all of Earth and Vestroia's energy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers train for the Battle Judgement, they learn of a new Core called the 'Nova Core'. Dan and Drago use its mysterious new powers against an unexpected opponent.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers split up as they attempt to master the new Nova technique. Lia does her best to protect a couple of children from a local bully.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers continue to look to their individual skill sets and experiences to help them master the Nova technique. Meanwhile, Athena faces an old foe at the Bakugan Academy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and his friends have to compete with their Bakugan against the ultimate villain, Hanoj. To do this, they use the new Nova technology. However, Dan continues to struggle with his mastery of the new tech.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan, Lia and Wynton fend off a gang of outlaws in an old-time Western theme park.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: In the first Battle Judgement match, Ajit must revisit his past while the others help protect island residents from a Swarm invasion.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: In the first Battle Judgement match, Ajit must revisit his past while the others help protect island residents from a Swarm invasion; Lia and Wynton have a topsy-turvy brawl in Ventana's River of Time in the second Battle Judgement match.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers return to Brakistan for the next Battle Judgement match, they discover that Lord Brakken's uncle Tim has mysteriously assumed the throne.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Mc Q and Everett Ray are chosen once again as Hanoi's brawlers in the third match, this time against Ajit and Shun. Meanwhile, a deadly tornado threatens to wreak havoc over Brakistan.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers attempt to capture a Swarm Bakugan and use its portal capabilities to return to Vestroia.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: When Veronica Venegas interviews the viral superstar Cubbo on her television show, the Awesome Brawlers are shocked to hear him telling a wide variety of lies to make himself look good.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Shun and Lightning volunteer to brawl in the fourth Battle Judgement match taking place in downtown Los Volmos while Dan and Lia protect the city's residents from the Swarm's attack.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Drago must save the day when an old enemy threatens to plunge Los Volmos into crisis.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: In the fifth Battle Judgement match, Dan and Drago face off against Tripp and Tiko in a Darkavian cave.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Wearing a special device Athena and Wynton built, Buzzy attempts to return the energy to the Yucatán Peninsula without Hanoj finding out.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers travel back to Auropolis for the sixth Battle Judgment match and take care of some unfinished business.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic night life.

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Mr Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the third Hollywood Home Game edition of the World Poker Tour, six famous faces make their poker dreams come true - a night at the World Poker Tour table.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Six players remain from a starting field of 546 entrants in the Party Poker Million III.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Reno is a boomtown once more as high stakes poker packs the Reno Hilton and the $1,700,000 World Poker Challenge

programme.title: Hitler The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Alec Guinness plays Adolf Hitler in this chilling dramatization of the last days of the Third Reich. Trapped in the Berlin bunker with his mistress and high command, Hitler comes apart...

programme.title: A Chorus Line
programme.desc: After narrowing down hundreds of Broadway hopefuls, choreographer Zach (Michael Douglas) leads a select group of dancers on an audition that could change their lives forever in this stunning adaptation of the hit Broadway musical.

programme.title: The Frog Prince
programme.desc: A young British girl journeys to Paris to go to college, and is determined to find the man of her dreams and fall madly in love. However, things don't work out quite the way she planned.

programme.title: The Passage
programme.desc: Enlisted by the French Resistance to transport a scientist and his family into Spain, a courageous Basque shepherd must guide the group safely across the dangerous Pyrenees...and elude the sadistic Nazi captain who is determined to capture them!

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: Company K
programme.desc: World War I troubled veteran Joe Delaney attempts to compile a history of his U.S. Marines company but nightmares about the German soldier he killed haunt him still.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Outpost 11
programme.desc: Set in an alternative past where steam power still rules the world, outpost 11 is the story of three soldiers manning a remote listening post in the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Sun
programme.desc: Two countries race to have the first successful landing on Mars.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: High school senior, Alex has a paranormal experience in her hometown, which leaves her with dangerous, supernatural abilities but no recollection of who she is or how she got her powers until she comes across her friend Sean, who offers to take her in.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Hard Hat & Home
programme.desc: Beat delivers a home in Utah to a frugal client who wants to do everything for himself, André and Joel build competing chicken coop mansions, while André covets a magazine cover story.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Jolly Ole Island
programme.desc: Joel assembles a millionaire’s retreat on a private island in England, Beat gets an emotional assignment, and Peter cannot take a vacation until he completes an HQ remodel for The Chief’s return.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Peter in a Pickle
programme.desc: Peter goes to Scotland and discovers that his boss Bryan Sr. has followed, Beat and André face a client with buyer’s remorse, while Joel agrees to build an elaborate doghouse and birdhouse, all for a slice of cake.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Wilderness Retreat
programme.desc: Joel builds an enormous house in the wilderness for a millionaire client he’s never met, Bryan Sr. promises to make log furniture and Beat must deliver, while Peter plays the role of a lifetime.

programme.title: Timber Kings: German Efficiency
programme.desc: Beat’s schedule is thrown by German customs and there’s only one way to catch up, Bryan Sr. takes Peter to the wilderness and they harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory

programme.title: The Search for Secret Santa
programme.desc: A reporter tries to uncover and bring closure to a long-lost, undelivered gift before Christmas.

programme.title: A Screenshot to Santa
programme.desc: In this holiday family film, two sisters left home alone on December 23rd overcome their sibling rivalry as they stave off would-be intruders.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: After a mercenary dies in a brutal firefight, a new regenerative surgery gives him a second chance at life and another shot at redemption.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: One hundred kilometres above the Earth’s surface lies an invisible frontier: the edge of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Galapagos: Darwin's Eden
programme.desc: The Galapagos archipelago contains 13 main islands and a hundred or so smaller rocks and reefs. The region's wilderness is so pristine and rich in life. / Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Human Prey: Killer Canines and Felines
programme.desc: On a camping trip in the Canadian wilderness, a family is unwittingly stalked by a hungry and opportunistic wolf. A mountain bike excursion in California becomes a life-and-death struggle when a cyclist is pounced and attacked upon by a 110 pound cougar.

programme.title: Wild Italy: From the Alps to Tuscany
programme.desc: In the episode “From the Alps to Tuscany”, the northern part of Italy is the focal point.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Tusk and Horns
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with weapons carved from bone and ivory stalk the open plains.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tears for Fears
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Picture This
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tag, You're It
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Training Day
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cutting the Apron Strings
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Short Handed
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Photo Op
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Song of the Wild West

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In WWII's final days, Nazis hid evidence of their crimes. SS officers transported boxes to Austria's remote Lake Toplitz, witnessed dumping them on May 1, 1945. Rumors. Rumors claimed the boxes held stolen gold, part of a $500M Nazi heist.

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Magi-Nation

programme.desc: Deviating from the quest to fulfill a mission from Orwin, the Final Dreamers find themselves escorting an old nemesis to Naroom: Shalax the bounty hunter. The Shadow Magi want him too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: After another night's performance of the robotic Willie Wombat Revue at the Willie Wombat Revue Theatre, a mysterious figure, wearing a long black cape, black fedora, white face mask, and known only as the Phantom, makes an appearance.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: High school senior, Alex has a paranormal experience in her hometown, which leaves her with dangerous, supernatural abilities but no recollection of who she is or how she got her powers until she comes across her friend Sean, who offers to take her in.

programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Sun
programme.desc: Two countries race to have the first successful landing on Mars.

programme.title: Timber Kings: German Efficiency
programme.desc: Beat’s schedule is thrown by German customs and there’s only one way to catch up, Bryan Sr. takes Peter to the wilderness and they harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Arkansas Shuffle
programme.desc: Beat sets logs in the pouring Arkansas rain for a client who orders renovations on the fly, a Catholic priest convinces Bryan Sr. and Peter to build a wedding gazebo for free.

programme.title: Timber Kings: The Boss Can Build
programme.desc: André the GM and master salesman must go to Ontario and lead his first build in more than 10 years, Beat has to collaborate in carving a hairy friend.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Old Dog, New Tricks
programme.desc: Bryan Sr. resurrects an ancient crane dubbed Rust Bucket to complete a remote fishing cabin. Meanwhile, Beat struggles with two huge projects competing for time and square footage on the work yard.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cold War

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow on the Screen
programme.desc: Peter must board a vessel to rescue a sailor who wants to defect. However, a trap has been set using radar to detect the Invisible Man on a TV screen.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Mink Coat
programme.desc: While vacationing, Peter's sister becomes convinced that the inner-lining of an airplane passenger's fur coat is being used for smuggling purposes.

programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Using an experimental treatment, a scientist (Pat Morita) helps an aging athlete (Adrian Pasdar) end his career on a high note by accelerating his reflexes for one last match. But with victory comes side-effects...courtesy of The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society controlled by aliens, a mother rebels when she is forced to give up her child to Mother, a wise alien who acts as a parent to all infants. Determined to get the child back, she embarks upon a dangerous quest that will change her world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Two brothers wrestle for control of their father's million-dollar pharmaceutical company. But when one brother discovers a drug which may hold the secret to eternal life, the battle for control becomes a rapid trip toward self-destruction.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A dying race of aliens come to Earth to stop its own extinction…by reanimating human corpses. But a government doctor (Mykelti Williamson) senses that there may be more to their plans than mere survival! D. W. Moffett and Rae Dawn Chong also star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Aggie (Thora Birch) is an outcast at her elementary school because strange things seem to happen around her. When she is suspended from school, her parents hire a nanny who seems too good to be true. Will they lose their only child to keep her safe?

programme.desc: The SRU’s plan to take down a hostage holding gunman who is convinced that a restaurant owner is planning a terror attack.

programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a human voice extinguish a flame? Can hypnotists plant suggestions in unwilling patients? Can hypnosis help bring back dormant memories?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 45

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 151
programme.desc: Are some types of people more tolerant to pain? Can a BBQ propane tank heat up enough in a fire to launch through a garage roof like a rocket?

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: The historic Palmyra is haunted by a mother and her six children who died there in a fire two days before Christmas over 100 years ago.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Visitors tape a chair flipped on its side. A woman's home becomes haunted after her husband dies. A woman and her son hear gunshots at the Gettysburg battlefield.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A phantom breaches security at a South Carolina government building. A pipe-smoking ghost haunts a lighthouse. A son killed in a car accident makes his presence known to his grieving mother. A demon attacks guests at a Texas house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: The ghostly antics of two young boys killed at Christmastime in 1964 are captured on video. The tortured souls of a sanitarium haunt a California house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Unlucky Gambler

programme.title: The Spider Woman

programme.desc: 'Escape artist' Crocker, escapes from the police to ask Holmes to clear him from a murder charge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams roll the dice to determine the ingredients for their next team challenge, while a contestant leaves due to an injury. The cooks cater for music legends during dinner service, including Stewart Copeland and Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Following the departure of two contestants from the competition, those remaining are challenged to create Indian-inspired meals, with the winning team earning a day of pampering at a luxurious spa.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts aspiring chefs through tough challenges. The teams are challenged to a blind taste test. Dinner service is held in honour of a group of decorated firefighters.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to create their own amuse-bouches, with the winners enjoying a helicopter ride to a luxury location and the losers preparing coconuts for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating mouthwatering steak dishes in a bid to impress Gordon and the owner of a renowned steak restaurant.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces

programme.desc: Dee Dee becomes hysterical when her mother goes into labor, while Mona remains calm; a motivational speaker (Evan Marriott) influences Charles.

programme.desc: Mona discovers that her new vice president title comes with new, sometimes unpleasant, responsibilities as she's forced to fire her friend and assistant Adam at the request of her boss Kai.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Practice What You Preach

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Employee Benefits Episode
programme.desc: When Dee Dee and her law school rival vie for the same internship at a prestigious firm, Dee Dee resorts to dressing provocatively to gain a competitive edge and impress her potential new boss.

programme.desc: When Dee Dee reluctantly rekindles a romance with her ex-boyfriend Clay (guest star Kiko Ellsworth), she wonders if he can appreciate her for more than her Jimmy Choos. Nu Soul Singer Musiq performs.

programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 1

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 2
programme.desc: Whatever was making itself known to the team earlier, continues in this episode as something seems to be following Yvette from the shadows.

programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fountain

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: A Haunting: Marked By Evil
programme.desc: When Stephanie Winters rejects the advances of a friend, he steals a piece of her hair and threatens to put a spell on her. Soon after, Stephanie notices strange noises and objects moving on their own. Could Stephanie's friend have conjured a demon?

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy
programme.desc: An aspiring Hollywood actress is reacquainted with an old friend and fellow actress who becomes deeply jealous of her beauty and success.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight
programme.desc: A well-respected TV news journalist in San Diego is stalked by a deranged fan who threatens rape and murder if she doesn't follow explicit instructions while on air.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Last Surf
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Thrill Of The Hunt
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Who Wants To Date A Rock Star
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Kiss and Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Headed For Heartbreak
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Hook Ups and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Spies, Lies and Alibis
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: First Date, Last Date
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.

programme.desc: An Interceptor has a narrow escape.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Tusk and Horns
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with weapons carved from bone and ivory stalk the open plains.

programme.title: Human Prey: Killer Bears
programme.desc: While hiking through Montana's Glacier National Park, Johan and Jenna Otter are attacked by a raging grizzly intent on protecting her cubs. In a remote British Columbia nature park, Patti and Kelly McConnell are mauled by a hungry 400-pound black bear.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Pregnant Flint fights to keep her home and tensions at Whiskers cause loyal Brea to make an uncharacteristic move.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zorro takes a group of Whiskers boys off roving at the Commandos.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Arctic Ocean: The Frozen Sea
programme.desc: The film follows a year in the High Arctic, where life is exceptionally entwined with the seasons. Journey to the Arctic where in winter, the sun doesn't rise for months on end, but in the summer thaws out in an explosion of life.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Venom
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where venomous creatures roam.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fight Like A Girl
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Higher Power
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission - convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a run away fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bus Stop Bruiser
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on the lame, Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Luck Be A Lady
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Behind the Hunt
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Catch A Falling Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Help Wanted: Angel
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Dust Child
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hotel Of Dreams
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Song For Christmas
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Omen of Blood River: A river of blood washes through a city in Bangladesh, an ominous noise scares a Canadian town and a giant hole appears in the clouds above California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: America's Loch Ness Monster: A Loch Ness Monster-esque creature is recorded in America, experts analyse evidence of a giant scaly egg, and birds are vaporized by a death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Curse of the Monster Spider: A massive spider's web takes over a park, and experts investigate if this monster's trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Beast That Ate Jaws: A shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, and experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is filmed near Russia's Area 51.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Return of the Ice Monster: A giant ice creature is spotted in Alaska, a jet has a close encounter with a UFO, and evidence of a lightning strike invites paranormal speculation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Incident at Area 51: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. Strange beams of light are reported in Argentina.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail, but everything hits the fan when Barbara finds out that she's been lying about Kieffer and kicks her out.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Curveball
programme.desc: Leah's upset when Ali needs another MRI. Jenelle and Kieffer are living in her car but begin to fight. Chelsea decides to give Adam another shot.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Intensive care
programme.desc: Kailyn finds an apartment through a non-profit organization and moves out without telling her mum. After a huge fight where Kieffer pushed her, Jenelle decides to file domestic charges.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No looking back
programme.desc: Leah gets the results of Ali's MRI and is relieved to find out there's nothing wrong with her brain. Meanwhile, Jenelle is spending time with Jace and finally at peace with her mum.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to being alone for the holidays, Jenelle regrets filing charges against Kieffer and Leah works to make the holidays special for the twins.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewson's auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The medics support a bomb squad as they attempt to defuse a bomb found in a house. They also treat a fugitive who held a store at knife-point and a teenager impaled on a gate.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Officers respond to an injured woman trapped in a van that is crushed between two lorries. They must rush to save her.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part.1 - Major planes of the Japanese Empire in WW2 included the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a highly maneuverable fighter; the Nakajima Ki-43 Hayabusa, a widely used fighter; and the Mitsubishi G4M Betty, a long-range bomber utilized for strategic missions.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Major planes of the Japanese Empire in WW2 included the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a highly maneuverable fighter; the Nakajima Ki-43 Hayabusa, another used fighter; and the Mitsubishi G4M Betty, a long-range bomber utilized for strategic missions.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express
programme.desc: April is covering the revival of the Orient Express. Shredder is on the train with Rocksteady and Bebop carrying the supercharger, a device to accelerate the train to super speed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: On the Case: Heartbreak in the Heartland
programme.desc: A quiet Midwestern community is rocked by a gruesome triple homicide. The unspeakable tragedy robs one man of his mother, grandmother and 5 year old son.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Predator
programme.desc: A sexual predator viciously murders a 16 year old girl. Can investigators catch him before he kills again?

programme.title: On the Case: A Drop of Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is murdered at work. Will a single drop of blood lead police to her killer?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws

programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A look at how modern forensic science outwits criminals' efforts to cover their evil deeds with methods that include dismembering their victims, or the use of fire or water.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Jason Webster was an undergraduate who became obsessed with mature student, Rebecca love. When Rebecca rejected his advances, he murdered her in a drunken rage.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Buck Ruxton was a well-respected GP and was greatly admired by his patients. But behind his respectable exterior, there lurked a duplicitous and jealous man.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: A bizarre murder case began when police attended the scene of a dog barking outside a camper van. Inside, they found its owner, Tony Robinson, murdered.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Despite only being trialled and convicted for the death of a single victim, Mary Ann Cotton is often classed as Britain's worst female serial killer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Scarlet Claw

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating mouthwatering steak dishes in a bid to impress Gordon and the owner of a renowned steak restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs cater for 40 `glampers' before a hectic dinner service which leads to a difficult decision for the chefs and Gordon himself. Someone will have to pay the ultimate price and be forced to leave the competition at this late stage.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs are reunited with their loved ones for a taste test, with the winner dining out with their family at a posh restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon's top two feel the pressure as they prepare their final menus. The pair do not have long to ponder and consider whether a simple or more adventurous approach will win the day.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This season's contestants head to Las Vegas where they participate in the signature dish challenge; the winners of the challenge ride on the world's tallest Big wheel while the losers peel 50 pounds of shrimp and 1,000 pounds of potatoes.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big My Little Pony Episode
programme.desc: When Mona finds out the pony Charles gave Dee Dee when they were kids is still around (who she named 'Daddy's Favorite'), Mona's childhood feelings of sibling rivalry resurface.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Just the Three of Us

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
